children.rationale: AI cannot physically sort waste, lift broken appliances, or operate recycling equipment on a sorting floor. The job is almost entirely hands-on physical work in unstructured environments, keeping AI exposure very low.

children.title: Elementary workers not elsewhere classified
children.rationale: Most tasks here are physical and interpersonal — directing patrons, operating rides, handling coats, cleaning facilities — things AI cannot do without robotics that aren't deployed at scale. The job is anchored in real-world presence and manual work, keeping AI exposure very low.

children.title: Sweepers and related labourers
children.rationale: AI cannot sweep streets, shovel snow, or clean drains — this job is almost entirely physical outdoor work in unstructured environments. Some machine operation may be partially automated, but human presence and judgment remain essential.

children.title: Garbage and recycling collectors
children.title_de: Arbeiter in der Abfall- und Wertstoffsammlung
children.rationale: AI cannot lift bins, ride trucks, or physically collect and sort rubbish from streets and buildings. The job is almost entirely manual and outdoors, leaving very little for AI to automate.

children.title: Meter readers and vending-machine collectors
children.rationale: Smart meters and remote reading technology already automate the meter-reading part of this job, and cashless vending machines reduce cash collection rounds. However, physical route-driving, machine restocking, fault inspection, and handling unauthorized connections still require human presence.

children.title: Odd job persons
children.rationale: AI cannot repair windows, paint walls, replace tap washers, or carry out the hands-on physical maintenance that defines this job. The work is almost entirely physical and site-specific, leaving very little for AI to automate.

children.title: Mechanical machinery assemblers
children.title_de: Berufe der Montage von mechanischen Bauteilen
children.rationale: AI-guided robotics can automate repetitive fastening and alignment steps on structured assembly lines, but fitting complex mechanical parts—especially in aircraft, turbines, or vessels—still requires hands-on dexterity and real-time physical judgment. The core work is physical transformation of materials, keeping overall AI exposure low.

children.title: Assemblers not elsewhere classified
children.rationale: AI cannot physically assemble bicycle frames, fit jewellery parts, or fasten furniture components — the core work is hands-on manipulation of physical materials. Robotic assembly exists but requires structured, high-volume environments; this catch-all category covers too many varied, small-batch products to automate cheaply.

children.title: Electrical and electronic equipment assemblers
children.title_de: Berufe der Montage von elektrischen und elektronischen Geräten
children.rationale: AI-guided robotics can automate some soldering and component placement, but the hands-on assembly, fine manipulation, and quality inspection in varied physical environments remain difficult to fully automate. The job is primarily physical manufacturing work, keeping AI exposure low.

title: Market-oriented Skilled Forestry, Fishery and Hunting Workers
title_de: Fachkräfte in Forstwirtschaft, Fischerei und Jagd – Marktproduktion

children.title: Forestry and related workers
children.rationale: AI cannot fell trees, plant seedlings, operate chainsaws, or fight forest fires — the core work is physical and takes place in unstructured outdoor environments. Some reporting and monitoring tasks have AI tools, but these are minor relative to the hands-on physical work.

children.title: Inland and coastal waters fishery workers
children.rationale: Fishing is overwhelmingly physical work — operating vessels, hauling nets, handling catch, and navigating real waters in unpredictable conditions. AI can assist with route planning or fish-school detection, but cannot replace the hands-on, outdoor, safety-critical core of the job.

children.title: Aquaculture workers
children.rationale: AI can assist with monitoring water quality sensors, analyzing growth data, and optimizing feeding schedules, but the core work—physically tending fish, maintaining tanks, harvesting, and hands-on disease management—requires direct physical presence. The job is overwhelmingly manual and biological, keeping AI exposure very low.

title: Armed Forces Occupations, Other Ranks
title_de: Angehörige der regulären Streitkräfte in sonstigen Rängen

children.title: Armed forces occupations, other ranks
children.title_de: Angehörige der regulären Streitkräfte in sonstigen Rängen
children.rationale: AI cannot replace the physical combat, weapons handling, and field operations that define this role. The job is fundamentally about physical presence, force, and real-world action in unpredictable environments, keeping AI exposure very low.

children.title: Non-commissioned armed forces officers
children.rationale: AI cannot lead troops in combat, enforce discipline under fire, or make split-second tactical decisions in unstructured, dangerous physical environments. The core work is irreducibly physical, interpersonal, and high-stakes, keeping AI exposure very low.

children.title: Commissioned armed forces officers
children.rationale: AI can assist with logistics planning, threat analysis, and writing situation reports, but commanding troops, making real-time combat decisions, and leading people under physical danger cannot be automated. The job's core output is physical leadership and command presence, keeping exposure low.

title: Street and Related Sales and Service Workers
title_de: Strassenhändler und auf der Strasse arbeitende Dienstleistungskräfte

children.title: Street vendors (excluding food)
children.rationale: Street vending is almost entirely physical: carrying goods, approaching people in public spaces, demonstrating products, and collecting cash on the spot. AI cannot replace the mobility, physical presence, and real-time human interaction that define this job.
